# TavilySearch

> Searches the web using the Tavily API. Returns structured results with titles, URLs, snippets, and relevance scores.

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| Version | 1.0 |
| Category | search |
| Requires network | yes |
| Requires credentials | yes |
| Modifies state | no |
| Cacheable | auto |

## Parameters

These are sent by the LLM at runtime when it calls the tool.

| Name | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| query | string | yes | - | Search query string |
| max_results | integer | no | 5 | Maximum number of results (default: 5, max: 20) |
| search_depth | string | no | basic | Search depth: 'basic' or 'advanced' |
| include_domains | array[string] | no | - | Only include results from these domains |
| exclude_domains | array[string] | no | - | Exclude results from these domains |

## YAML Config

Optional overrides passed via the agent YAML config block.

*No config options.*

## Usage

### Simple (no config)

```yaml
agent:
  tools:
    - "TavilySearch"
```

## Result Schema

Returns unstructured text.
